message:
✨ Add route constants and consistent drill-down navigation (#2528)

- Added missing route constants (AI_AGENTS, LLM_D_BENCHMARKS, INSIGHTS,
  feedback/issue shortcuts, dev/test routes) to routes.ts
- Added contextual parent-resource navigation to drill-down views that
  were missing it: EventsDrillDown, NodeDrillDown, GPUNodeDrillDown,
  YAMLDrillDown, LogsDrillDown
- Added 'pod' translation key to drilldown.fields in all locale files
- Follows the same navigation pattern used by DeploymentDrillDown,
  PodDrillDown, and other existing drill-down views

Fixes #2393

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
